text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
——Wait… R-Really…? 
I was wondering why I kept getting notifications… It's going viral?

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: It's not just Love-chan's fans like normal… It broke containment to a completely different audience…

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: …This piece…

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: It's full of the deep emotion I felt when I first saw Love-chan running…

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
I could feel my chest burning hot—— 
Just thinking about it makes my heart race. It's my dearest memory.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: I tried to take that unforgettable moment, burning deep in the back of my mind, and put it on the canvas… And now it's going viral…

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
? 
…A DM? 
W-Who could it be?

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
It's amazing, Maru-chan! 
You have people all over the world looking at your art!

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
Yeah…! 
I never imagined this would happen…

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
It's still getting a lot of comments. 
Look——

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
Let me see… 
"why am i crying" "Ah, youth" "This art makes me want to keep on going"

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: No matter how the viewer interprets this painting, it brings out a strong emotional reaction. It's so lovely…

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
…Yeah. 
…So, um, also…

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
…
Look at this!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: ! Wow! An invitation to be part of an art exhibition? And they want the two of us to do it as a pair…!

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: Apparently, it's a show where only a select few amateurs chosen by pros get to exhibit their work. I-It's a super special honor…!

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: A-And they say they want us to make a new piece for the exhibition, too…!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
Finally, your talent's being recognized… It makes me so happy. 
We'd better work together to make a 
masterpiece!

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
"We gladly accept…" 
…There. 
And send…

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: …Hehe. I can't believe I get to do this as a pair with her.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
I- I wonder what we should make. 
I'll need to ask Love-chan what her ideas are… 
…Hm?

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
…
…More comments?

"Can't wait to see the next one!" 
"i want merch of this～" 
"followed!" 
"I'm waiting for your next work."

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: Whoa… W-We'd better work hard a-and make something great for them…!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! If you've got the time, I'd love if you came to see!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! If you've got the time, I'd love if you came to see!

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: "Love-chan and Maru-chan are gonna make the best art ever!"
I happened to run into Marche Lorraine and Loves Only You, and overheard that they'd been invited to an exhibition.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: "Art" is a such a simple word, but there's so many things it can be… It's hard to wrap my head around all the different mediums.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: I spent all day yesterday thinking about it, but I can't seem to settle on one idea.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: I can pin ideas down for streaming just fine, but I guess that doesn't exactly carry over to art.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: ! "That just means you have a vivid imagination. The ideas just can't stop coming, and it's too much, right? I've been there!"

After seeing Loves Only You's worried expression, Marche Lorraine's own expression took on an apologetic color. 
What should I say——
choice_data_list: Marche Lorraine can handle it, right?
Trust her to do it if you can't.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: "Huh!?"

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're right! 
I've got the most capable partner in the world for this project!

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: "Huh?"

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Haha, you're right. We're not in this alone, we're a team! I believe in you, Maru-chan!

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
"! 
Love-chan is counting me…"
Marche Lorraine was capable of making art that drew even pros' attention. It would be a good idea to let her lead the project.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Though obviously, I'm not just going to dump all the work on you. I think I've got what it takes, so anything you need me to do, I'll give it 100%!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Still, though… I really want to see what you come up with.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
I want to help you make the piece YOU want to make. 
…Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: A- "Are you sure?"

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: I'm sure.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
! 
Oh…

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
…
"Just leave it to me! I'm gonna come up with the best idea ever!"
Marche Lorraine heartily accepted Loves Only You's request with her eyes burning bright.
